changeSet.author: openelis-virologylab

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.lab_unit_role_map WHERE lab_unit = 'VirologyLab'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name IN ('VirologyLab Lab Technician', 'VirologyLab Bioinformatician', 'VirologyLab Manager', 'VirologyLab PI', 'VirologyLab Data Manager')

changeSet.comment: Create VirologyLab lab unit entry in lab_unit_role_map

changeSet.author: openelis-virologylab

preConditions.sqlCheck: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.lab_unit_role_map WHERE lab_unit = 'VirologyLab'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name IN ('VirologyLab Lab Technician', 'VirologyLab Bioinformatician', 'VirologyLab Manager', 'VirologyLab PI', 'VirologyLab Data Manager')

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinlims.lab_roles lr JOIN clinlims.system_role sr ON lr.role::int = sr.id WHERE lr.lab_unit_role_map_id = (SELECT lab_unit_role_map_id FROM clinlims.lab_unit_role_map WHERE lab_unit = 'VirologyLab') AND sr.name IN ('VirologyLab Lab Technician', 'VirologyLab Bioinformatician', 'VirologyLab Manager', 'VirologyLab PI', 'VirologyLab Data Manager')

changeSet.comment: Assign all VirologyLab roles to VirologyLab lab unit

column.name: role
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'VirologyLab Lab Technician')

column.name: role
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'VirologyLab Bioinformatician')

column.name: role
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'VirologyLab Manager')

column.name: role
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'VirologyLab PI')

column.name: role
column.valueComputed: (SELECT id FROM clinlims.system_role WHERE name = 'VirologyLab Data Manager')
